notes: UPlay launches and updates itself. After UPlay finishes updating, it closes to launch Trials. Trials never generates a window but is apparently running. Unplayable at this point.
title: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition

notes: Disabling Uplay overlay (inside Uplay itself) is enough to get the game running perfectly. Wasn't able to test online multiplayer (no matches found, don't know if it would be the same on Windows).
title: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition

notes: Make sure that after Uplay updates, you disable Uplay Overlay (in the Uplay settings menu). Works perfectly after that. Did not test multiplayer, but according to the subreddit (https://www.reddit.com/r/TrialsGames/comments/9hkiol/what_happened_to_trials_evolution_multiplayer/), it's probably not functional.
title: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition

notes: First time the game didn't start up. Crashes after some minutes with Uplay overlay enabled. Works perfectly without the overlay (platinum).
title: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition

notes: Game runs perfectly after disabling Uplay overlay : right clic on uplay icon (on systray) -> Settings -> uncheck "enable in-game overlay for supported games"
title: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition

notes: Uplay overlay needs to be disabled, otherwise it works perfectly fine.
title: Trials Evolution: Gold Edition
